data.name: InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User not found

data.name: UserAlreadyExists
data.value: A user with this email already exists

data.name: InvalidToken
data.value: Invalid authentication token

data.name: TokenExpired
data.value: Authentication token has expired

data.name: AccessDenied
data.value: Access denied. You don't have permission to perform this action

data.name: ValidationError
data.value: Validation error occurred

data.name: RequiredField
data.value: The {0} field is required

data.name: InvalidEmail
data.value: The email address is not valid

data.name: InvalidPassword
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain uppercase, lowercase, and numbers

data.name: InvalidDate
data.value: The date provided is not valid

data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found

data.name: DuplicateResource
data.value: A duplicate resource already exists

data.name: InvalidOperation
data.value: The requested operation is not valid

data.name: InsufficientPermissions
data.value: You don't have sufficient permissions to perform this action

data.name: DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred while processing your request

data.name: DatabaseConnectionError
data.value: Unable to connect to the database. Please try again later

data.name: DatabaseTimeout
data.value: The database operation timed out. Please try again

data.name: ConstraintViolation
data.value: The operation violates database constraints

data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again

data.name: ServiceUnavailable
data.value: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later

data.name: FileNotFound
data.value: The requested file was not found

data.name: ConfigurationError
data.value: A configuration error occurred
